pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates project at this path (line 11: PROJECT_DIR="$WORKSPACE_DIR/$PROJECT_NAME")
setup_task.sh creates file at line 74 with explicit filename
setup_task.sh creates schema at line 40 with explicit filename
Schema enumeration (setup_task.sh lines 48-52) allows only 'Photon' or 'Electron'; task description specifies 'Photon' as the corrected value
Schema defines ReferenceDoseRate as xs:integer (setup_task.sh line 56); task description specifies '600' as the integer value to use
Schema defines Dmax as xs:decimal within DepthDoseParams (setup_task.sh line 60); task description specifies '<Dmax>1.5</Dmax>' as the required element

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic XML configuration file created during setup. The project path is /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/RadOncPhysics containing beam_model.xml and beam_schema.xsd. The schema defines three required corrections: RadiationType enumeration must be either 'Photon' or 'Electron' (task fixes to 'Photon'), ReferenceDoseRate must be an integer (task fixes to '600'), and DepthDoseParams requires a Dmax decimal element (task adds '<Dmax>1.5</Dmax>'). All three expected values are consistent with the XSD schema constraints and explicitly specified in the task description.
